items.text: Inspect shot creation hooks, VideoGenerationModal dependencies, and ClipAction context menu pattern
Implement T1 multi-generation shot creation path
Implement T3 shared SelectionContextMenu component
Verify T2 provider dependencies and record evidence
Run targeted tests and checkpoint batch updates

items.text: Inspect current gallery and timeline selection/menu implementations and existing in-flight edits
Implement T4 gallery context menu and modal flow
Implement T5 timeline context menu shot/video actions
Run targeted gallery and timeline test modules
Checkpoint batch 2 execution metadata
Review current diff for gallery/timeline changes and set up the T6 verification run
Run the full vitest suite and address any regressions
Run a throwaway smoke test for sequential multi-generation insertion and remove it
Checkpoint batch 3 execution metadata

item.text: Batch 3 is the verification pass. I’m running the full Vitest suite first, then I’ll add a temporary sequential-insertion smoke test for `createShotWithGenerationsPath`, review the diff for regressions, and checkpoint the batch metadata.
The full suite is running now. Once that finishes I’ll either fix any regressions and rerun the whole suite, or move straight to the targeted smoke test and diff review.

The full run is surfacing a broad set of unrelated failures outside this feature area. I’m letting it finish so T6 can document the complete suite state, then I’ll run the required smoke test and targeted validations against the files touched by this feature.

The full suite is still draining, but the important part for this feature is already visible: the touched gallery, shot-creation, and timeline tests are passing, while the failures are clustered in unrelated pre-existing areas. I’m waiting for the final suite summary so the checkpoint can record exact counts, then I’ll run the temporary sequential smoke test and clean it up.
